{"id":"project-LICHEN-p1ls","title":"drain_tx_queue loses re-queued packet if queue is full with equal priority","description":"File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:314-318

When CAD fails and we try to re-queue with Priority.ROUTING:

    self.tx_queue.push(frame_bytes, priority=Priority.ROUTING)

If the queue is full of ROUTING packets (e.g., a routing storm), push() will raise QueueFullError because preemption requires strictly higher priority.

From tx_queue.py:230:
    if priority < lowest.priority:  # strict less-than
        # preempt
    else:
        raise QueueFullError

ROUTING is the highest priority (0), so it cannot preempt other ROUTING packets. The packet we just popped (which was successfully dequeued) is now lost.

Fix: Before popping, ensure we have transmission capability, or use a separate re-queue slot.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:22:17.589366Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:22:17.589395Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-p1ls","title":"drain_tx_queue loses re-queued packet if queue is full with equal priority","description":"File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:314-318

When CAD fails and we try to re-queue with Priority.ROUTING:

    self.tx_queue.push(frame_bytes, priority=Priority.ROUTING)

If the queue is full of ROUTING packets (e.g., a routing storm), push() will raise QueueFullError because preemption requires strictly higher priority.

From tx_queue.py:230:
    if priority < lowest.priority:  # strict less-than
        # preempt
    else:
        raise QueueFullError

ROUTING is the highest priority (0), so it cannot preempt other ROUTING packets. The packet we just popped (which was successfully dequeued) is now lost.

Fix: Before popping, ensure we have transmission capability, or use a separate re-queue slot.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:22:17.589366Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:21:29.75377328Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:21:29.75377328Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:26:29.75377328Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:21:29.75377328Z"}

new_value: Reservation-based drain_tx_queue + pop_reservation prevents loss on requeue with equal priority (no pop until transmit confirmed). Matches suggested fix. Verified in tx_queue and link_layer. Commit d060ebf36.
